description: Golden expected result for the confined local browser sandbox DOM action. The primary block describes a successful run on a host where a Chromium-family browser is available; the safe_unavailable_alternative block describes the equally-acceptable degraded result when no local browser/CDP endpoint is reachable. Machine-specific fields (resolved_target absolute path, cdp_browser version string) are intentionally omitted because they vary by host.

safe_unavailable_alternative.blocked_or_unavailable_reason: <one of: no local Chromium-family browser found in standard locations | local CDP endpoint did not become available | no local page target exposed by CDP | DOM action did not complete in the sandbox page>
